title: Crisp Slovakian Potato Wrap
description: A crispy and flavorful wrap filled with Slovakian potatoes and a sweet twist. Perfect for a quick snack or meal.
instructions: Wash and peel the Slovakian and sweet potatoes, then dice them.
Place the diced potatoes on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until tender.
Meanwhile, wrap the wrap in a dry pan over medium heat for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until crispy.
Transfer the wrap to a cutting board and fill it with the roasted potatoes, crisp, and any other desired toppings.
